hero.title: Automotive excellence
hero.subtitle: Premium professional detailing — we come to you. Your vehicle deserves the very best.
hero.mobileBadge: We come to your address — no travel required on your part

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Premium services designed to reveal your vehicle's natural shine

exteriorBasic.name: Basic Exterior Wash
exteriorBasic.description: High-pressure rinse, full soap wash, drying, exterior window cleaning and wheel cleaning.

exteriorInterior.name: Exterior + Interior Wash
exteriorInterior.description: Full exterior wash plus complete interior vacuum, surface wipe-down and interior window cleaning.

shampoo.name: Seat & Carpet Shampoo
shampoo.description: Deep cleaning of seats (fabric or leather), carpet extraction and shampooing, deodorizer.

decontamination.name: Decontamination
decontamination.description: Iron removal, complete chemical decontamination of the bodywork and temporary protection.

paintProtection.name: Paint Protection
paintProtection.description: Application of professional wax or sealant, long-lasting UV protection and unmatched shine.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Éclat Auto?
whyUs.subtitle: We bring professional detailing expertise directly to your home

mobile.title: Fully Mobile Service
mobile.description: We come to you. No need to move your vehicle — we work at your home or office.

quality.title: Professional Products
quality.description: We exclusively use certified products, safe for your paint and the environment.

experts.title: Certified Technicians
experts.description: Our team is trained and certified. Every detail matters — we treat your vehicle like our own.

satisfaction.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
satisfaction.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority. Not happy? We come back, at no extra charge.

book.title: Book Online
book.description: Choose your service, date and enter your address in a few clicks.

arrive.title: We Come to You
arrive.description: Our technician arrives at the agreed time with all necessary equipment.

enjoy.title: Enjoy the Results
enjoy.description: Your vehicle is transformed — shiny, clean and ready to impress.

contact.title: Ready to Reveal Your Vehicle's Shine?
contact.subtitle: Book now and enjoy premium service at your door.

booking.title: Book Your Service
booking.subtitle: Fill out the form to book your at-home detailing
